growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Discovery: The AI memory cycle is still supply-constrained, with DRAM and NAND pricing surging as HBM/server memory demand outruns capacity, giving Micron near-term pricing power.

Barrick is a cheap, cash-generative gold major with Q1 production/cost outperformance, a large buyback, and 50%+ target upside while trading about 30% below its 52-week high.

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner

catalysts_general: Discovery: A cluster of insider buying by the CFO, chief legal officer, and directors after a CEO-exit selloff signals high-conviction internal support for a depressed turnaround.

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Discovery: Lululemon has capitulated to roughly 53% below its 52-week high after guidance and downgrade pressure, and the estimated September 3, 2026 earnings report is the catalyst to prove whether product/China weakness is bottoming while the bear case is that the premium growth story is structurally impaired.

catalysts_general: Discovery: CEO Perry A. Sook bought 12,235 shares on June 26, 2026 at $162.2647, committing about $1.99M of personal capital and taking direct ownership to 899,044 shares.

catalysts_general: Discovery: Regal Rexnord is an under-the-radar physical AI supplier because motors, gearing, and linear motion components are needed for robotics, conveyor systems, warehouse automation, and data-center infrastructure.

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Discovery: Charter is a high-FCF, low-multiple cable name down about two-thirds from its 52-week high, with July 24, 2026 Q2 results and Cox/Liberty Broadband deal progress as catalysts while the bear case is secular broadband weakness and leverage.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Deep-value cable turnaround with strong FCF, heavy short interest, insider buying, and near-term Q2/Cox-Liberty catalysts, but secular broadband losses and leverage cap conviction.

catalysts_general: Discovery: Space Force's missile-warning and tracking architecture needs ground operations and data transport, and Kratos' reported $447 million Space Force missile-tracking ground-system follow-on makes it a direct small-cap beneficiary of Golden Dome execution.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Defense and space demand, raised FY26 guidance, and the $446.8M Space Force GMI award support upside after a sharp pullback, but valuation and cash burn cap conviction.

catalysts_general: Discovery: Persian Gulf tanker rates nearly doubled as producers rushed to clear stranded crude after Hormuz disruptions, creating a spot-rate earnings catalyst for product and crude tanker operators that may persist if Red Sea and Gulf security risks remain unstable.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Cheap product-tanker operator with strong Q2 rate visibility, capital returns, and a near-term earnings catalyst, but the thesis remains highly exposed to spot-rate normalization.

catalysts_general: Discovery: CLO and Executive Officer Julio Cesar Bueno bought 110,441 preference shares on July 1, 2026 at roughly $18.10, a near-$2.0M insider commitment in a large-cap bank ADR.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Cheap Bradesco turnaround with improving ROAE, a fresh executive open-market buy, and Q2 earnings as a near-term catalyst, but credit-cost and Brazil/FX risk cap conviction.

catalysts_general: Discovery: China's export-control blacklisting of USA Rare Earth makes the company a higher-beta domestic supply-chain substitute for US defense and industrial buyers trying to de-risk rare-earth magnets.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Government-backed mine-to-magnet rare earth platform has multiple 2026 catalysts, but valuation and execution risk keep this below STRONG BUY.

catalysts_general: Discovery: Persistently disrupted Hormuz traffic and higher tanker freight rates create direct upside for crude and product tanker owners with spot-market exposure such as International Seaways.

FDA-approved Lumvoa launch and positive elegrobart Phase 3 data create a real TED franchise setup, but commercial execution and cash burn keep this below strong-buy conviction.

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner

Elite GLP-1 execution and pipeline catalysts are real, but the stock is near its 52-week high with limited target upside and little valuation margin of safety.

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Discovery: Russia's renewed missile and drone attacks on Kyiv ahead of the July 7-8 NATO summit and the draft NATO pledge for $80 billion of Ukraine military aid in 2026 increase urgency for Patriot, interceptors, LTAMDS and integrated air-defense replenishment where RTX has direct program exposure.

catalysts_general: Discovery: GE Vernova is exposed to the power-generation bottleneck behind AI data center growth, with turbine demand, backlog, and margin expansion driving institutional interest.

catalysts_general: Discovery: Axon has fresh analyst and data support after strong AI/public-safety bookings and raised 2026 revenue guidance, keeping the growth story active.

catalysts_general: Discovery: CarMax has multiple open-market insider purchases during a CEO-led operational turnaround, with improving unit volumes offset by margin pressure.

catalysts_general: Discovery: Director Carlos Alberini bought 11,388 RH shares through a trust on June 29 for about $1.83 million, a large open-market purchase after material share-price weakness in the home furnishings group.

Apple remains a high-quality compounder with strong Q2 execution and AI/software catalysts, but the stock is priced near perfection at roughly 32x forward earnings with only about 2% target upside.
Speculative microcap turnaround with improving Q1 revenue and margins plus a potentially transformative acquisition LOI, but ongoing losses and dilution/execution risk keep it below buy quality.
Strong Q1 margins, distribution support, S&P upgrade, and preferred redemption are offset by high leverage, thin commodity-linked margins, limited analyst upside, and no deep-discount entry.

catalysts_general: Discovery: Dropbox is an avoid candidate because AI search and workspace tools threaten to commoditize file sync while its own AI monetization remains uncertain against Microsoft, Google, and Apple ecosystems.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Cheap on forward earnings and cash flow, but revenue, ARR, and paying users are nearly flat while AI/bundled-suite competition and weak analyst upside make the setup unattractive.

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Discovery: Upwork is an avoid candidate because AI agents and internal automation are reducing some demand for human freelance labor, pressuring marketplace growth even as AI-related project GSV rises.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Cheap profitability and AI-work growth are outweighed by flat GSV, shrinking active clients, lowered growth expectations, restructuring risk, and persistent insider selling.

catalysts_general: Discovery: UBS upgraded the stock while roughly 27% of the float was short and days-to-cover stood near 5.8, creating squeeze mechanics after better-than-feared earnings and analyst target hikes.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Turnaround expectations and short-squeeze momentum have outrun fundamentals: CBRL trades above consensus target levels despite declining comps, negative FCF, high leverage, and expensive EV/EBITDA.
Q2 delivery rebound and AI/robotaxi optionality are real, but the stock already prices in near-perfect execution at 154x forward earnings and 5.8x PEG.
